# Nodal by Enigmatic

> Operational orchestration platform that connects people, systems, and processes into automated flows.

## Links

- Website: https://enigmatic.works
- Docs (human): https://enigmatic.works/en/docs
- Full docs (plain text): https://enigmatic.works/llms-full.txt

## Documentation (Machine-Readable)

Static JSON — cached on CDN, zero latency:

- English: https://enigmatic.works/docs/en.json
- Vietnamese: https://enigmatic.works/docs/vi.json
- Traditional Chinese: https://enigmatic.works/docs/zh-TW.json

## API Endpoints

- Trigger a flow: POST https://enigmatic.works/api/flows/{flowId}/execute
- Webhook (resume flow): POST https://enigmatic.works/api/webhooks/{token}
- Correlation signal: POST https://enigmatic.works/api/automation/signal

## Key Concepts

- Flows: Automated processes built with nodes and edges
- Nodes: Individual actions — API calls, data transforms, human tasks, decisions
- Action Flows: Running instances of a flow
- Human Tasks: Steps that pause execution and wait for human input
- Expressions: Dynamic references written as {{ steps.NodeId.output.field }}
- Webhooks: External systems resume paused flows via unique single-use URLs
